statements.status_notes: Go stdlib CVEs in kubectl v1.33.5. A maintainer confirmed Go was already updated to 1.24.9 on release-1.33 but not yet released; fix merged, release pending at close. [ref: https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/135083]
